items.summary:
CRAZYCEE PRODUCTIONS
DANCERS WANTED
Youth • Teen • Adult Divisions
1 Head Dancer 10 Company Dancers
Ages 7 & Up Lead positions: 25+ preferred
We're building performers not followers.
Seeking dancers with a foundation in Hip Hop Culture and Street Dance.
Experience in other dance styles is welcomed.
If selected you'll have opportunities for:
• Live Performances • Productions • Promotional Videos • Community Events • Future Paid Opportunities
Initial training and rehearsals may include unpaid opportunities while building the company.
We're looking for individuals who are:
✔ Trainable ✔ Focused ✔ Disciplined ✔ Dedicated ✔ Committed to Excellence
We don't just teach choreography. We develop artists, leaders, and unforgettable performers.
Is this YOU?
CrazyCee Productions "Fulfilling the need people didn't know they needed... creating memories they'll never forget." E: crazyceeproductions@gmail.com  #dance #dancers #ATX #Austin  #StillOnMyGrind
items.title: CRAZYCEE PRODUCTIONS

items.text:
A Warning to the Dance Community: My Experience with Next Act Global
In August 2025, I applied for a dance contract in Hurghada, Egypt, through Next Act Global. I was communicating with Samantha Booty and everything went smoothly. I had no safety concerns because a past dancer told me it was the best experience of her life. I had no doubt in my mind that I would be treated well, so I had no idea of the extreme mistreatment waiting for me…

Before flying out, Samantha connected me with another girl on my flight. At the airport, we realized our assigned hotel wasn't on the official information pack list, but we were too excited to think anything of it. When we landed, Samantha sent someone to pick us up and said she’d see us soon. 

At the hotel, we met a third girl who arrived a few days earlier and revealed she was completely alone. This was a shock; we were told we were joining an existing team, but we were actually the very first dancers for a new partnership between Next Act Global and a company called Epic Entertainments. The hotel’s entertainment manager told us to just enjoy Egypt until the rest of the team arrived.

Everything changed when the fourth girl arrived. The manager stopped speaking to us directly, instead calling her to meetings at 11:00 PM to relay instructions. He enforced strict curfews and banned us from leaving the hotel without permission. Seeing Instagram posts of dancers at other hotels going out for lunch, dinner and drinks, I messaged Samantha to ask why we couldn't. She claimed there was no such rule and told us to get ready to meet her outside for drinks. 

When we messaged our manager to let him know, he became furious and told us to stay away from her. We went anyway to tell Samantha how uneasy we felt. The manager followed us outside and watched our conversation from a distance. Because of this, Samantha refused to take us out but gave her word she would sort out the rules. The moment she left, the manager ushered us straight to his office. From that point on, Samantha completely abandoned us.

In his office, he accused us of disrespecting him, banned us from leaving under any circumstances—except to buy phone data across the road—and declared our "holiday" over. He told us some of us looked fat and weak, so he arranged for us to habe a pt session every other day, put us on strict diets, and restricted us to water or juice. He constantly questioned our meals, asked if we were eating ‘sweets things’ like cakes, and regularly touched our stomachs while making degrading comments. 

He made us line up and weigh ourselves in front of each other weekly, promising a "present" or a “suprise” if we loose weight. Later, he forced us to film each other stepping on and off the scales and send it to him so we couldn't "cheat." 

On top of this, the personal trainer constantly harassed me, making inappropriate comments about his deep attraction to me and telling the other girls to help him get with me. Even though the manager knew this made me feel highly vulnerable and on edge, he did absolutely nothing. Throughout this our manager emotionally abused us, claiming he did this to give us a better life and wouldn't bother if he didn't care so deeply. 

Initially, we had two 2-hour rehearsals a day with a PT session in between. Another girl and I were forced to do an extra two hours of intense cardio daily and were questioned constantly if we had completed it. 

After we began rehearsals for a show he made us choreograph ourselves, a fifth girl arrived. We warned her about the rules and fitness requirements, which immediately distressed her. She met with the manager to explain that the UK has a major body image epidemic and that his treatment made her uncomfortable. He completely invalidated her, saying English girls are "too soft" and that his rules were fine. She flew home the next day.

With two more arrivals, rehearsals increased to three a day—morning, afternoon, and 10:30 PM until midnight—on top of PT and extra cardio. Exhausted from the extreme atmosphere, we expressed our frustration to Hashem. He completely dismissed us, saying, "I agree with your manager." from that another girl decided to fly home. 

At the end of the first month, they committed outright wage theft, refusing to pay us because we "hadn't worked," even though we had performed a live show. By the end of the second month, as we prepared for a Halloween show, another girl broke down in tears explaining how depressed she was and said she wanted to go home. Hashem called us all in, completely invalidated her feelings, and blackmailed us. He called her selfish, said she was ruining his business, and threatened to separate our team and scatter us across different hotels if we didn't convince her to stay. We vowed to stick together, so we agreed she would stay only until a replacement was found. She left the day after the Halloween show. 

Down to four dancers, they refused to let us perform as a group, and the manager told us we wouldn't get paid until a new girl arrived so it was up to us how quickly we could teach her the entire show. 

When the new girl arrived, she revealed she had been transferred from another team after a terrible experience and had already heard about our situation. She exposed that Samantha knew exactly what we were going through; instead of helping, Samantha was actively gossiping and joking with other teams about our diets, weekly weigh-ins, lack of pay, and the fact that we didn't even have working visas.

When two more girls quit, things became incredibly hostile. The manager called us stupid, naive English girls, said we broke his trust, and guilt-tripped us by claiming he looked at us like daughters. Then came the severe threats to trap us: he stated that if we tried to leave the country, he would have police follow us to the airport and imprison us for breaching contract. He claimed if we broke rules, we would be fined for our entire stay and jailed if we couldn't pay. He even threatened that if we stepped outside the hotel, he would call the police on us for not having visas and pretend he didn't know us.

He then flew in an English girl and three Brazilian dancers. One of the Brazilian girls had lived in Egypt a long time, knew her boundaries, and was the first to validate our feelings and speak up for us. Realizing she was proving we weren't delusional, the manager immediately restricted our communication with her, claiming she would "corrupt our heads." 

We had to beg him just to go to the cinema to see Wicked, and he only allowed it if she stayed behind. One night, she took us to McDonald's for dinner and promised to defend us against any backlash. The moment we arrived, the manager called her, screaming down the phone. When she challenged his behavior, he responded, "I want to keep them pure."

During my last month, we performed more regularly and hoped things would stabilize. Instead, we were pulled into a meeting and told we wouldn't be paid for any of the shows because the hotels allegedly complained we were bad. He launched into personal attacks, calling one girl a bad dancer, another stiff, another clueless, and told two of us we were fat. He gave us one week to lose 2 stone, telling us to starve ourselves if we had to. After the meeting, he even trailed us around the dinner buffet, sitting directly in our eyeline to monitor exactly what we were eating.

Luckily, my family flew out the following week and I flew home with them. Before I left, management tried to harass and bully me into signing an NDA so I could never speak out or else be sued. Because my family was physically there, they stepped in and refused to let me sign it.

Since being home, I've had time to reflect. I can't change the past, but I know now that I wasn't delusional—my feelings were completely valid. Next Act Global is a company with disgusting morals, and Samantha and Hashem should be ashamed of themselves for exploiting young performers. Their company is built on broken promises and lies. 

For my entire contract, I was emotionally abused, manipulated, controlled , and stripped of my basic human rights under the guise that it was in my best interest. This company is currently running training intensives in Manchester and recruiting fresh talent directly from UK universities. I am breaking my silence to give other girls the courage to speak out, and to stop this nightmare from happening to anyone else.

topComments.text: 5th or 6th post now about this company that ive seen, insanity. It's just lucky you all survived
This should be shared to a journalist who can share on media or articles. They might be able to investigate further, sounds like human trafficking

🌊 SYNCHRONIZED SWIMMING!!! 🌊

✨ New Job Opportunity – China 2026 ✨

We are looking for 10 female synchronized swimmers with multiple routines to showcase! 🏊‍♀️💃

Job Conditions:

🎯 4 shows per day (additional shows on holidays)

📅 1 day off per week

🏠 Shared accommodation for two people

✈️ Company provides:

✅ Round-trip flights

✅ Work visa

✅ Medical examinations

✅ 1-year contract

📩 Contact me for more information

Interested candidates must send:

🔹 Full name

🔹 Age, height & weight

🔹 Nationality

🔹 Photos & videos showcasing your performance

🔹 Valid passport (must be up to date)

👉 Send to private message 📲

items.text:
I'm the director/ producer of the upcoming short film "Date Mate" shooting in Denver and I'm looking to fill a couple roles to round out the cast. Positions are unpaid but I will feed you well and it's a really fun romantic comedy script. Shooting July 24th and 25th, 8 hour days.

Misty (F, 20-30s) classic Colorado hippie type who is addicted to their vape pen and loves Pokemon 

Caitlin (F, 20-30s) cute, girl-next-door type with a love for filmmaking

Paige (F, 20-30s) mousy, cottage-core style woman with the secret skill of being a black belt in judo

topComments.text: I would love to be any of these!
Can I be a teenager for any extra? I can send an email with my materials.

items.text:
Casting call: Digital spot for RV Rental Company 

Looking for talent for an RV Rental shoot on Tuesday July 7 in the evening (~5pm to past sunset)

Location: Lakewood or Golden 

Looking for a real family with 2 adults and 2 kids ages ~6-12, and bonus points for a dog 🙂 

Lifestyle scenes around an RV/camping - would like to include biking and/or paddle board (I'll provide gear for that). Let me know if all are comfortable doing either. 

Rate: $2500 total for the group. 

Digital/global/perp

If you are interested, please email me (rileyjhanlon@gmail.com) with a group shot (preferred) or individual pics to show everyone, put “RV Spot - (your name)” in the subject. 

Thank you!

topComments.text: Asian family ok?
Location?

Looking for couples to be killed by Winnie The Pooh!!!
Hello, i am needing a few couples to be killed by Winnie the pooh. In total, I new 4 pairs of couples who can participate in this film. 

Filming dates: July 3 to the 10th

Compensation: None, but will be happy to send back the clips we've filmed for your reel.

Location: Fort Collins Colorado

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I’ve just completed my first year studying Digital Film Production at Birmingham City University.

I’m looking for any opportunity to get experience on professional film sets. I’m happy to start in any trainee, assistant or entry-level crew role. My goal is to learn, work hard and build my career in the film industry.

I'm based in Birmingham and can travel to London, Manchester, Liverpool and across the Midlands.

Portfolio: https://donetskiy.myportfolio.com/

If anyone is looking for an extra pair of hands or knows of any opportunities, I’d really appreciate it.

Thank you!

items.text:
THE PERFECT COMPANIONS
"In a world of betrayal, what happens when the betrayer becomes the betrayed?"

A comedy of misunderstandings, mistaken identities, and gender identity.

Casting Call

We are looking for performers for the following roles:

Mr. Rossi

Meticulous, precise, and constantly anxious. A bisexual man.

Mrs. Rossi

A sweet, caring, and understanding wife, often a little naïve.

Mrs. Valli

A strong-willed, fiery woman who is still deeply in love with her husband despite being constantly neglected by him.

Ms. Eleonora

A young, sexy, and beautiful woman. Silly, carefree, and emotionally immature.

Mr. Teo

A fragile, flamboyant gay man with a flair for drama.

Dr. Andreasi

A professional, composed, and respected psychologist.

Rehearsals

Rehearsals will take place during July and August, on dates and times to be agreed upon, at East 15 Acting School – Loughton Campus.

items.text:
🎬 We're Hiring: Korean Language Coach (Los Angeles) 🇰🇷

Language Academia is looking for a Korean Language Coach to join our growing team!

We're looking for someone who loves teaching, enjoys being on camera, and is excited to help create engaging educational content for students around the world.

This role includes:

• One-on-one and group Korean coaching

• Creating and adapting lesson materials

• Filming YouTube and social media content

• Opportunities to coach actors and performers

• Flexible scheduling (online and in-person)

We're looking for someone who:

• Is a native or near-native Korean speaker

• Can teach beginner through advanced Korean

• Has strong English skills

• Is comfortable on camera

• Has an Associate degree or higher in a related field (Language, Linguistics, Korean Studies, Anthropology, History, Performance Arts, etc.)

Bonus if you have:

• Acting or performance experience

• Teaching or tutoring experience

• Speak three or more languages

• Knowledge of Korean regional dialects and accents

If you're passionate about language, culture, education, and media, we'd love to hear from you!

📍 Los Angeles area ONLY

Email your headshot and resume to support@languageacademia.com

Meet the team you are joining: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7CfzLB3V-oZDHzVkdjLryApPbUWLL6Cx

• Flexible scheduling (online and in-person)

We're looking for someone who:

• Is a native or near-native Korean speaker

• Can teach beginner through advanced Korean

• Has strong English skills

• Is comfortable on camera

• Has an Associate degree or higher in a related field (Language, Linguistics, Korean Studies, Anthropology, History, Performance Arts, etc.)

Bonus if you have:

• Acting or performance experience

• Teaching or tutoring experience

• Speak three or more languages

• Knowledge of Korean regional dialects and accents

If you're passionate about language, culture, education, and media, we'd love to hear from you!

📍 Los Angeles area ONLY

Email your headshot and resume to support@languageacademia.com

Meet the team you are joining: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7CfzLB3V-oZDHzVkdjLryApPbUWLL6Cx

items.text:
YOUTH OF FREE STATE 

This is your chance ! 

Register Now ! Not tomorrow or waiting for last minutes ! 

For more informations and Updates ! Remember to follow this page Re Phethile Art Production

sharedPost.text:
RE PHEITHILE ART PRODUCTION IS EXPANDING
 
“Where There Is No Art, A People Die Inside.” 

NEW BRANCHES NOW OPEN IN YOUR TOWN!

Young Creatives of the Free State — This is YOUR moment!

Re Phethile Art Production is growing. We are bringing art, culture & opportunity out of the cities and into your kasi, your school, your community. 

“Art is not a luxury. It is the oxygen of the soul.”

We are now officially recruiting in:
  
✨️Bethlehem
✨️Qwaqwa
✨️Paul Roux
✨️Reitz
✨️Vrede
✨️Senekal
✨️Clarens
✨️Fouriesburg
✨️Rosendal
✨️Lindley  
✨️Kestel
✨️Botshabelo
✨️Petrus Steyn
✨️Brandfort

Additional branches will be announced soon. Youth in other towns, contact us directly to request a branch in your area.

If you live for:
💃🕺Dance
 🎭 Drama
 🎶  Music
🎬 Film  
✍️ Storytelling
🎙Poetry 
🌍 Culture   
📝🖌✏️ Visual Arts
🪘👏 Gwijo & Acappella 

Then build with us.Let’s bring the kasi to life and revive Art & Culture where it matters most. 

“A nation that does not tell its own stories will be told by others.”

EVERYONE IS WELCOME 

All races, all backgrounds — Black, Coloured, Indian, and White youth. Art has no boundaries, only possibilities.

---
HOW TO JOIN:

WhatsApp “JOIN” to 081 750 9746 with:  
1.  Name & Surname  
2.  Age & Gender 
3.  Town 
4.  Recent Picture 

Be part of the movement. Be part of the legacy.
  
Please SHARE this with every young creative you know ✨ 

#RePhethileArt #FreeStateCreativeEconomy #ArtRevival #YouthInArts #KasiToTheWorld

Reviving the Kasi: Why Re Phethile Matters Now” 

There was a time when every kasi had a theatre group, a dance crew practicing on dusty tar, and a choir that could make your chest vibrate. Culture was not something we watched on TV. It was something we lived. 

Today, many of our young people have talent, but they do not have a stage. They have stories, but no microphone. They have dreams, but no structure. That is why Re Phethile Art Production is expanding.

Re Phethile means “we have done it” in Sesotho. It is a declaration. It is a promise that we will not wait for opportunity to come to us. We will build it, town by town, branch by branch. 

From Bethlehem to Botshabelo, Qwaqwa to Clarens, Reitz to Brandfort — we are opening doors. Not just for dancers, actors, or musicians. But for every young person who believes that art can change a life, and a community. 

“If you can dream it, you can stage it.”This is the heartbeat of our work. We believe that poetry can heal, drama can teach, dance can unite, and film can document our truth for generations. 

We welcome every race, every language, every background. Because art does not ask where you come from. It asks what you are willing to create. 

To the youth of the Free State: This is your moment. Do not let it pass you by. WhatsApp us. Show up. Bring your voice, your body, your ideas. We will do the rest together. 

Be part of the movement. Be part of the legacy. 

A re tsoeleng pele ka bonono le setso. Forward with Art & Culture.

items.text:
Looking for new opportunities!
Dear friends,

I am currently looking for work as a professional ballet dancer.

If you know of any theatres, dance companies, event agencies, show productions, opera houses, cruise productions, or other projects looking for a ballerina, I would be very grateful for any recommendations or contacts.

I am a professional ballet and contemporary dancer, open to performances, productions, events, and creative collaborations.

Please feel free to message me or share this post. Thank you so much! 🤍

items.text:
**Casting Call- Need Background Actors **

I'm casting for a comedy short film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**

People in Bar/Background artists- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 5 women and 5 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on either 11th or 12th July.

**Shoot Location:** Vancouver Downtown

**Date:** 11th and 12th July, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

Live action Fan Film of EPIC: The Musical (A rendition of The Odyssey)

With nearly 1 Million YouTube views on the first project, my crew and I are embarking on the next endeavor! 

This is a fan made passion project. Roles are volunteer and non-union with food, costumes, and nerdy vibes provided. 

Dates: September TBD, based on actor availability. Time commitment will be 1-5 days depending on role. 

Roles needed: male 18-35
* General background: Ancient Greek men (ethnicity does not matter for this project)
* stunts for small fight scene (great for your demo reel if you're looking to get started! Training provided if needed)
* lip syncing lines and dramatic deaths for key characters (see form for details)

For all details and more information on the project, please see the audition link: https://forms.gle/tyoNfZgnx7Zq3dtEA

For a look at the past project, check it out here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=99bRYplIKPM

Please note! This is a project made by nerds, for nerds. We are creating some really cool projects with high production value, but at the end of the day this is not for profit and is meant to bring together actors, cosplayers, and film makers to just have fun on set.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ODYSSEUS cMy CASTING CALL ROLES NEEDED: SUITORS •ANTINOUS EURYMACHUS AMPHINOMUS MELANTHIUS PALACE MAIDS SUITORS (WITH STUNTS) Join me for the grand finale ofthe EPIC ν Projects! 'Odysseus' will be action packed, covered (fake) blood, and have enough brooding to last 20 years. This project all hands deck and youp chance to get involved and die dramati death! Vancouver BC Canada Must be 18+ Filming September 2026 (Dates TBD)'

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Casting Call (Non-Union) for ACTORS WITH EXPERIENCE IN THE HEALTHCARE SYSTEM, ALL AGES AND DEMOGRAPHICS, INCLUDING COUPLES AND FAMILIES - Paid

Looking for actors to play the role of patients and families in a hospital/nursing setting. The video clips will be used in an online training system for nurses counsellors. The session includes a prepared character backgrounds and scripted language/prompts with some improvising.

All ages, all gender expressions/identities, all ethnicities, and persons with disabilities are welcome. 

All experience levels with acting are welcome to apply. We are committed to making this a respectful and safe process, with open communication and respect for boundaries.

Comfortable English fluency is required.

We are strongly committed to authenticity in our educational portrayals, so it's preferred that actors match specific cultural backgrounds and gender identities/expressions, have some experience with hospitalization and medical treatment, and where indicated, some experience with or around certain medical conditions. 

Expected filming date is July 26, but our needs are ongoing and more will occur in the future, so please submit if you're interested at all.

Location is BCIT Burnaby Campus. Pay is $400 CAD, with the expectation of up to a half day on location. This rate is intended to compensate for both location time and prep time.

At this time, we are casting a variety of roles, including:

Cisgender woman of color, age 50-60, heavyset, preferably with past experiences of medical hospitalization and/or ER visits

Transmasc / trans man, age 18-25 (all other demographics are acceptable) with experience navigating the healthcare system

Child (age 5-10 or can realistically play that age) and their parent (all other demographics are acceptable). Ideally a real parent/child pair. Though not a must-have, it would be nice to recruit a parent/child dyad who have had their own experiences in the past of being hospitalized due to a medical issue so they can draw on those experiences for our improv cases.

Black/Afro-Canadian/African American (Sub-saharan African and/or Afro-Latino ethnicity) cisgender man, age 18-30

Good To Have: Personal History of/Familiarity with Sickle Cell Anemia (either as a patient themself or family member)

Indigenous (specific nation membership or community identity preferred), age 50-60, cisgender man, preferably heavyset. Personal history of diabetes preferred though not necessary.

Couple, age 60-70, white, cisgender woman (the patient) and her husband. Ideally, a real husband/wife couple. Actor will be portraying a patient with a history of breast cancer who broke her hip and presented to the ER. Imaging reveals her cancer has return and her prognosis is terminal.

Nurse 1: Cisgender woman (all other demographics acceptable). Preferably an actual nurse, nursing student, or someone with healthcare practitioner experience

Nurse 2: Cisgender man (all other demographics acceptable). Preferably an actual nurse, nursing student, or someone with healthcare practitioner experience

Attending Physician: White, cisgender man, age 35-60. Preferably with healthcare practitioner experience.

Please email [phil@skillsetter.com](mailto:phil@skillsetter.com) with your headshots and resume, as well as some information about you, such as gender identity, age, cultural/racial background. If you've submitted for a past session, you're welcome to submit again. We do often receive more submissions than we are able to respond to, but we do read them all, and we do save your submissions for future consideration.

Update: Booking form now fixed.

Liverpool's Royal Court are hosting monthly actors workshops, covering a range of topics from audition technique to sense memory. Workshops are competitively priced and group sizes are kept small, ensuring all attendees get excellent one-to-one guidance and feedback.

[https://liverpoolsroyalcourt.com/](https://liverpoolsroyalcourt.com/studio)
items.previewDescription: Royal Court Liverpool is the friendliest theatre in the city. With pre-show dining and a range of drinks served before and after the show, a trip to The Court is night of great entertainment.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SHORT HORROR FILM (Pennsylvania)
Hey all!
My name is Colby Killian and I am a senior from Lycoming College. For my thesis film, I aim to create a roughly twenty-minute long narrative psychological horror short that will premiere at a festival on Lycoming College's campus this coming fall.
Synopsis: Radius of a Soul follows June Seymour, a young woman who frequently suffers dissociative thoughts relating to the mysterious disappearance of her closest friend, Nova Chalmers. To commemorate Nova on the anniversary of her disappearance, June and her friends, Max and Larry, have planned to share memories over dinner. Although they have all burdened this loss, June has experienced the most turmoil with her grief which Max and Larry refuse to understand. When the dinner is cut short due to disagreement, June has to decide whether to follow the haunting visions of Nova or believe the friends that don’t support her.
Currently, I am audition for all roles, most of which are in the 22-30 age range. Character breakdowns and age specifications below.
June Seymour- (woman age range 22-28 years old ~ 29 speaking lines) A young woman who lives alone despite her need for codependency. She struggles deeply with the disappearance of her best friend Nova Chalmers, believing Nova was the only one truly capable of understanding and supporting her. This has left her obsessive and desperate for similar connections, but her life only gets increasingly frustrating when she cannot find that. She has intrinsically tied herself to Nova, leaving her spiraling down a path of self-destruction.
Zircus- (man age range 25-50 years old ~ no speaking lines) A supernatural, animalistic life form with mysterious motives. Zircus originally existed only as a make-believe creature both June and Nova created when they were kids, but now has materialized into an entity beyond horror. Zircus has a strange attraction to June; the torment it brings her, the more its hold on her tightens.
(Note: This role will require the use of cosmetics. Please be aware of this if interested.)
Larry Holland- (man age range 22-28 years old ~ 33 speaking lines) June’s hotheaded and unemployed friend whose only concern in any situation is how it will benefit him first and foremost. Larry is wrapped up in his own careless lifestyle, but his immaturity and unwillingness to see things from a different perspective only serve to further draw a wedge in his and June’s relationship.
Maxwell Evans- (man age range 22-28 years old ~ 11 speaking lines) Another of June’s friends who oftentimes finds himself acting as a mediator between Larry and June, though keeping a front of indifference as to not further escalate conflict. As a family man, he gives all of his time and attention to his wife and child, frequently leaving himself emotionally exhausted and unenthusiastic to be there for June.
Nova Chalmers- (woman age range 22-28 years old ~ 4 speaking lines) June’s closest friend and supporter, whose disappearance haunts every aspect of June’s everyday life. Since vanishing, Nova’s likeness has been reduced to bait for June to unwittingly follow, luring her further into Zircus’s trap.
Filming is currently planned to take place sometime in mid-late July, primarily on weekends. Additionally, our main shooting locations are all located in Williamsport, Pennsylvania, I am very flexible and am open to discussions pertaining the schedule, transportation, etc. Lastly, this will be paid positions. I will get a clearer estimate on what pay will be as I continue to structure the budget.
If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out at kilcolb@lycoming.edu. Alternatively, you may also reach me at (607)-358-0854.
Thank you for your time!
#auditions #castingcall #shortfilm #film #Pennsylvania

topComments.text: Sounds great. Good luck.
